name: feynman
description: Auto-inject ASCII diagram rules into Codex and Claude Code prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Draw ASCII diagrams when structure appears.
interface.longDescription: feynman injects concise diagram rules on every prompt so flows, hierarchies, comparisons, priorities, and status summaries render as readable ASCII diagrams.
defaultPrompt: Use feynman diagrams for structured answers.
Compare these options with ASCII columns.
